items.text: 产出“雨水泵站启停策略API”，围绕业务人员要对雨水泵站启停策略过程中的关键记录做准入判断、差异提示和结果归档设计接口。接口接收对象编码、发生时间、责任主体、配置规则和证据摘要，返回通过、拦截、待复核及可读原因。规则命中、人工复核和重复提交要分开处理，不能用笼统失败替代具体原因。验收准备正常记录、缺字段、规则冲突、重复处理，检查计算口径、异常解释、任务状态和数据回放。
我来帮你设计并实现这个"雨水泵站启停策略API"。首先让我了解一下当前工作目录的结构，然后规划整个实现方案。
工作目录是空的，我将从头开始创建这个雨水泵站启停策略API。让我先规划整个实现方案，然后逐步实现。

{"file_path":"/Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz00183/app/models.py","content":"from enum import Enum
from typing import Optional, List, Dict, Any
from datetime import datetime
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, field_validator


class JudgmentResult(str, Enum):
    PASS = "通过"
    BLOCK = "拦截"
    PENDING_REVIEW = "待复核"


class BlockReason(str, Enum):
    RULE_HIT = "规则命中"
    MANUAL_REVIEW_REQUIRED = "需人工复核"
    DUPLICATE_SUBMISSION = "重复提交"
    MISSING_FIELDS = "字段缺失"
    RULE_CONFLICT = "规则冲突"
    CALIBRATION_ERROR = "计算口径异常"


class RuleType(str, Enum):
    START_PERMIT = "启泵许可"
    STOP_PERMIT = "停泵许可"
    FLOW_THRESHOLD = "流量阈值"
    WATER_LEVEL_THRESHOLD = "水位阈值"
    RAINFALL_THRESHOLD = "降雨量阈值"
    TIME_WINDOW = "时间窗口"
    EQUIPMENT_STATUS = "设备状态"


class TaskStatus(str, Enum):
    PENDING = "待处理"
    PROCESSING = "处理中"
    COMPLETED = "已完成"
    REJECTED = "已驳回"
    ARCHIVED = "已归档"


class StrategyRecordRequest(BaseModel):
    object_code: str = Field(..., description="对象编码，泵站唯一标识")
    occur_time: datetime = Field(..., description="发生时间，策略执行的时间点")
    responsible_subject: str = Field(..., description="责任主体，执行人或部门")
    config_rules: Dict[str, Any] = Field(..., description="配置规则，包含规则类型、参数、阈值等")
    evidence_summary: str = Field(..., description="证据摘要，支持决策的关键数据摘要")

    @field_validator('object_code', 'responsible_subject', 'evidence_summary')
    def not_empty_string(cls, v):
        if not v or not v.strip():
            raise ValueError("字段不能为空")
        return v.strip()


class ValidationDetail(BaseModel):
    field_name: str
    issue_type: str
    message: str


class RuleMatchDetail(BaseModel):
    rule_id: str
    rule_type: RuleType
    rule_name: str
    matched_condition: str
    expected_value: Any
    actual_value: Any
    severity: str = "warning"


class DifferenceHint(BaseModel):
    hint_type: BlockReason
    field: Optional[str] = None
    current_value: Optional[Any] = None
    reference_value: Optional[Any] = None
    description: str


class JudgmentResponse(BaseModel):
    record_id: str
    result: JudgmentResult
    reason: str
    block_reason: Optional[BlockReason] = None
    validation_errors: Optional[List[ValidationDetail]] = None
    matched_rules: Optional[List[RuleMatchDetail]] = None
    difference_hints: Optional[List[DifferenceHint]] = None
    task_status: TaskStatus
    processed_at: datetime
    requires_manual_review: bool = False
    review_deadline: Optional[datetime] = None


class StrategyRecord(BaseModel):
    record_id: str
    object_code: str
    occur_time: datetime
    responsible_subject: str
    config_rules: Dict[str, Any]
    evidence_summary: str
    judgment_result: JudgmentResult
    block_reason: Optional[BlockReason] = None
    reason: str
    matched_rules: List[Dict[str, Any]] = Field(default_factory=list)
    validation_errors: List[Dict[str, Any]] = Field(default_factory=list)
    difference_hints: List[Dict[str, Any]] = Field(default_factory=list)
    task_status: TaskStatus
    requires_manual_review: bool = False
    review_result: Optional[str] = None
    reviewed_by: Optional[str] = None
    reviewed_at: Optional[datetime] = None
    created_at: datetime
    updated_at: datetime
    is_duplicate: bool = False
    duplicate_of: Optional[str] = None
    data_playback_available: bool = True
    calibration_note: Optional[str] = None


class ReviewRequest(BaseModel):
    record_id: str
    review_result: str = Field(..., description="复核结果：通过/驳回")
    reviewed_by: str = Field(..., description="复核人")
    review_comment: Optional[str] = None


class TaskStatusResponse(BaseModel):
    record_id: str
    object_code: str
    task_status: TaskStatus
    judgment_result: Optional[JudgmentResult] = None
    current_stage: str
    processing_history: List[Dict[str, Any]]
    estimated_completion: Optional[datetime] = None


class DataPlaybackRequest(BaseModel):
    record_id: str
    include_calculation_details: bool = True
    include_raw_evidence: bool = False
"}

{"file_path":"/Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz00183/app/database.py","content":"import sqlite3
import json
from datetime import datetime
from typing import List, Optional, Dict, Any
from contextlib import contextmanager

from .models import StrategyRecord, TaskStatus, JudgmentResult, BlockReason


class Database:
    def __init__(self, db_path: str = "pump_strategy.db"):
        self.db_path = db_path
        self._init_db()

    @contextmanager
    def _get_connection(self):
        conn = sqlite3.connect(self.db_path)
        conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
        try:
            yield conn
            conn.commit()
        finally:
            conn.close()

    def _init_db(self):
        with self._get_connection() as conn:
            cursor = conn.cursor()

            cursor.execute(
                """
                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS strategy_records (
                    record_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                    object_code TEXT NOT NULL,
                    occur_time TEXT NOT NULL,
                    responsible_subject TEXT NOT NULL,
                    config_rules TEXT NOT NULL,
                    evidence_summary TEXT NOT NULL,
                    judgment_result TEXT NOT NULL,
                    block_reason TEXT,
                    reason TEXT NOT NULL,
                    matched_rules TEXT,
                    validation_errors TEXT,
                    difference_hints TEXT,
                    task_status TEXT NOT NULL,
                    requires_manual_review INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                    review_result TEXT,
                    reviewed_by TEXT,
                    reviewed_at TEXT,
                    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                    is_duplicate INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                    duplicate_of TEXT,
                    data_playback_available INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
                    calibration_note TEXT
                )
                """
            )

            cursor.execute(
                """
                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS processing_history (
                    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                    record_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                    stage TEXT NOT NULL,
                    status TEXT NOT NULL,
                    operator TEXT,
                    comment TEXT,
                    occurred_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                    FOREIGN KEY (record_id) REFERENCES strategy_records (record_id)
                )
                """
            )

            cursor.execute(
                """
                CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_object_code ON strategy_records(object_code)
                """
            )
            cursor.execute(
                """
                CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_occur_time ON strategy_records(occur_time)
                """
            )
            cursor.execute(
                """
                CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_task_status ON strategy_records(task_status)
                """
            )
            cursor.execute(
                """
                CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_record_id ON processing_history(record_id)
                """
            )

    def save_record(self, record: StrategyRecord) -> None:
        with self._get_connection() as conn:
            cursor = conn.cursor()
            cursor.execute(
                """
                INSERT OR REPLACE INTO strategy_records (
                    record_id, object_code, occur_time, responsible_subject,
                    config_rules, evidence_summary, judgment_result, block_reason,
                    reason, matched_rules, validation_errors, difference_hints,
                    task_status, requires_manual_review, review_result, reviewed_by,
                    reviewed_at, created_at, updated_at, is_duplicate, duplicate_of,

                    record.updated_at.isoformat(),
                    1 if record.is_duplicate else 0,
                    record.duplicate_of,
                    1 if record.data_playback_available else 0,
                    record.calibration_note,
                ),
            )

    def add_processing_history(
        self,
        record_id: str,
        stage: str,
        status: str,
        operator: Optional[str] = None,
        comment: Optional[str] = None,
    ) -> None:
        with self._get_connection() as conn:
            cursor = conn.cursor()
            cursor.execute(
                """
                INSERT INTO processing_history (
                    record_id, stage, status, operator, comment, occurred_at
                ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
                """,
                (
                    record_id,
                    stage,
                    status,
                    operator,
                    comment,
                    datetime.now().isoformat(),
                ),
            )

    def get_record(self, record_id: str) -> Optional[StrategyRecord]:
        with self._get_connection() as conn:
            cursor = conn.cursor()
            cursor.execute(
                "SELECT * FROM strategy_records WHERE record_id = ?", (record_id,)
            )
            row = cursor.fetchone()
            if not row:
                return None
            return self._row_to_record(dict(row))

    def update_task_status(
        self,
        record_id: str,
        task_status: TaskStatus,
        judgment_result: Optional[JudgmentResult] = None,
        review_result: Optional[str] = None,
        reviewed_by: Optional[str] = None,
        review_comment: Optional[str] = None,
    ) -> bool:
        with self._get_connection() as conn:
            cursor = conn.cursor()
            update_fields = ["task_status = ?", "updated_at = ?"]
            params = [task_status, datetime.now().isoformat()]

            if judgment_result:
                update_fields.append("judgment_result = ?")
                params.append(judgment_result)

            if review_result:
                update_fields.append("review_result = ?")
                params.append(review_result)

            if reviewed_by:
                update_fields.append("reviewed_by = ?")
                params.append(reviewed_by)
                update_fields.append("reviewed_at = ?")
                params.append(datetime.now().isoformat())

            params.append(record_id)

            cursor.execute(
                f"UPDATE strategy_records SET {', '.join(update_fields)} WHERE record_id = ?",
                params,
            )

            if review_result:
                cursor.execute(
                    """
                    INSERT INTO processing_history (
                        record_id, stage, status, operator, comment, occurred_at
                    ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
                    """,
                    (
                        record_id,
                        "人工复核",
                        review_result,
                        reviewed_by,
                        review_comment,
                        datetime.now().isoformat(),
                    ),
                )

            return cursor.rowcount > 0

    def get_processing_history(self, record_id: str) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        with self._get_connection() as conn:
            cursor = conn.cursor()
            cursor.execute(
                """
                SELECT * FROM processing_history
                WHERE record_id = ?
                ORDER BY occurred_at ASC
                """,
                (record_id,),
            )
            rows = cursor.fetchall()
            return [dict(row) for row in rows]

    def query_records(
        self,
        object_code: Optional[str] = None,
        start_time: Optional[datetime] = None,
        end_time: Optional[datetime] = None,
        task_status: Optional[TaskStatus] = None,
        judgment_result: Optional[JudgmentResult] = None,
        limit: int = 100,
        offset: int = 0,
    ) -> List[StrategyRecord]:
        with self._get_connection() as conn:
            cursor = conn.cursor()
            query = "SELECT * FROM strategy_records WHERE 1=1"
            params = []

            if object_code:
                query += " AND object_code = ?"
                params.append(object_code)

            if start_time:
                query += " AND occur_time >= ?"
                params.append(start_time.isoformat())

            if end_time:
                query += " AND occur_time <= ?"
                params.append(end_time.isoformat())

            if task_status:
                query += " AND task_status = ?"
                params.append(task_status)

            if judgment_result:
                query += " AND judgment_result = ?"
                params.append(judgment_result)

            query += " ORDER BY occur_time DESC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?"
            params.extend([limit, offset])

            cursor.execute(query, params)
            rows = cursor.fetchall()
            return [self._row_to_record(dict(row)) for row in rows]

    def get_statistics(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        with self._get_connection() as conn:
            cursor = conn.cursor()
            stats = {}

            cursor.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM strategy_records")
            stats["total_records"] = cursor.fetchone()["total"]

            cursor.execute(
                """
                SELECT judgment_result, COUNT(*) as count
                FROM strategy_records
                GROUP BY judgment_result
                """
            )
            result_counts = cursor.fetchall()
            stats["by_result"] = {row["judgment_result"]: row["count"] for row in result_counts}

            cursor.execute(
                """
                SELECT task_status, COUNT(*) as count
                FROM strategy_records
                GROUP BY task_status
                """
            )
            status_counts = cursor.fetchall()
            stats["by_status"] = {row["task_status"]: row["count"] for row in status_counts}

            cursor.execute(
                """
                SELECT block_reason, COUNT(*) as count
                FROM strategy_records
                WHERE block_reason IS NOT NULL
                GROUP BY block_reason
                """
            )
            reason_counts = cursor.fetchall()
            stats["by_block_reason"] = {row["block_reason"]: row["count"] for row in reason_counts}

            return stats

    def _row_to_record(self, row: Dict[str, Any]) -> StrategyRecord:

            task_status=TaskStatus(row["task_status"]),

            updated_at=datetime.fromisoformat(row["updated_at"]),
            is_duplicate=bool(row["is_duplicate"]),
            duplicate_of=row["duplicate_of"],
            data_playback_available=bool(row["data_playback_available"]),
            calibration_note=row["calibration_note"],
        )

{"file_path":"/Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz00183/app/main.py","content":"import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from typing import List, Optional, Dict, Any
from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException, Query
from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse

from .models import (
    StrategyRecordRequest,
    StrategyRecord,
    JudgmentResponse,
    ReviewRequest,
    TaskStatusResponse,
    TaskStatus,
    JudgmentResult,
    BlockReason,
    DataPlaybackRequest,
)
from .rule_engine import RuleEngine
from .database import Database

app = FastAPI(
    title="雨水泵站启停策略API",
    description="雨水泵站启停策略准入判断、差异提示和结果归档接口",
    version="1.0.0",
)

rule_engine = RuleEngine()
db = Database()


@app.post(
    "/api/v1/strategy/judge",
    response_model=JudgmentResponse,
    summary="策略记录准入判断",
    description="接收泵站启停策略记录，执行准入判断并返回结果",
)
async def judge_strategy(request: StrategyRecordRequest) -> JudgmentResponse:
    record_id = f"REC{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d%H%M%S')}{uuid.uuid4().hex[:8].upper()}"
    processed_at = datetime.now()

    db.add_processing_history(
        record_id=record_id,
        stage="接收请求",
        status="开始处理",
        operator=request.responsible_subject,
        comment=f"对象编码: {request.object_code}",
    )

    validation_errors = rule_engine.validate_fields(request)
    if validation_errors:
        db.add_processing_history(
            record_id=record_id,
            stage="字段校验",
            status="失败",
            comment=f"发现{len(validation_errors)}个校验错误",
        )

    is_duplicate, duplicate_of = rule_engine.check_duplicate(request)
    if is_duplicate:
        db.add_processing_history(
            record_id=record_id,
            stage="重复检测",
            status="失败",
            comment=f"与记录{duplicate_of}重复",
        )

    matched_rules, rule_conflicts = rule_engine.match_rules(request)
    if matched_rules:
        db.add_processing_history(
            record_id=record_id,
            stage="规则匹配",
            status="完成",
            comment=f"命中{len(matched_rules)}条规则",
        )

    calibration_hints = rule_engine.check_calibration(request)

    (
        judgment_result,
        block_reason,
        reason,
        difference_hints,
        requires_review,
    ) = rule_engine.judge(
        request,
        validation_errors,
        matched_rules,
        is_duplicate,
        rule_conflicts,
        calibration_hints,
    )

    if judgment_result == JudgmentResult.PASS:
        task_status = TaskStatus.COMPLETED
    elif judgment_result == JudgmentResult.PENDING_REVIEW:
        task_status = TaskStatus.PENDING
    else:
        task_status = TaskStatus.REJECTED

    record = StrategyRecord(
        record_id=record_id,
        object_code=request.object_code,
        occur_time=request.occur_time,
        responsible_subject=request.responsible_subject,
        config_rules=request.config_rules,
        evidence_summary=request.evidence_summary,
        judgment_result=judgment_result,
        block_reason=block_reason,
        reason=reason,
        matched_rules=[r.model_dump() for r in matched_rules],
        validation_errors=[e.model_dump() for e in validation_errors],
        difference_hints=[h.model_dump() for h in difference_hints],
        task_status=task_status,
        requires_manual_review=requires_review,
        created_at=processed_at,
        updated_at=processed_at,
        is_duplicate=is_duplicate,
        duplicate_of=duplicate_of,
        calibration_note=rule_engine.get_calibration_note(matched_rules),
    )

    db.save_record(record)

    if not is_duplicate and judgment_result != JudgmentResult.BLOCK:
        rule_engine.cache_processed_record(record_id, request)

    db.add_processing_history(
        record_id=record_id,
        stage="判断完成",
        status=judgment_result,
        comment=reason,
    )

    if judgment_result == TaskStatus.ARCHIVED or judgment_result == JudgmentResult.PASS:
        db.add_processing_history(
            record_id=record_id,
            stage="结果归档",
            status="已归档",
            comment="记录已自动归档",
        )

    review_deadline = None
    if requires_review:
        review_deadline = processed_at + timedelta(hours=24)

    return JudgmentResponse(
        record_id=record_id,
        result=judgment_result,
        reason=reason,
        block_reason=block_reason,
        validation_errors=validation_errors if validation_errors else None,
        matched_rules=matched_rules if matched_rules else None,
        difference_hints=difference_hints if difference_hints else None,
        task_status=task_status,
        processed_at=processed_at,
        requires_manual_review=requires_review,
        review_deadline=review_deadline,
    )


@app.post(
    "/api/v1/strategy/review",
    summary="人工复核",
    description="对待复核的策略记录进行人工审核",
)
async def review_strategy(request: ReviewRequest) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    record = db.get_record(request.record_id)
    if not record:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"记录 {request.record_id} 不存在")

    if not record.requires_manual_review:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="该记录不需要人工复核")

    if record.review_result:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=f"该记录已被 {record.reviewed_by} 复核过")

    if request.review_result == "通过":
        new_status = TaskStatus.COMPLETED
        new_judgment = JudgmentResult.PASS
    elif request.review_result == "驳回":
        new_status = TaskStatus.REJECTED
        new_judgment = JudgmentResult.BLOCK
    else:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="复核结果必须为'通过'或'驳回'")

    success = db.update_task_status(
        record_id=request.record_id,
        task_status=new_status,
        judgment_result=new_judgment,
        review_result=request.review_result,
        reviewed_by=request.reviewed_by,
        review_comment=request.review_comment,
    )

    if not success:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail="复核失败")

    db.add_processing_history(
        record_id=request.record_id,
        stage="结果归档",
        status="已归档",
        operator=request.reviewed_by,
        comment="人工复核完成，记录已归档",
    )

    return {
        "code": 0,
        "message": "复核成功",
        "data": {
            "record_id": request.record_id,
            "new_status": new_status,
            "new_judgment": new_judgment,
            "reviewed_by": request.reviewed_by,
            "reviewed_at": datetime.now().isoformat(),
        },
    }


@app.get(
    "/api/v1/strategy/{record_id}/status",
    response_model=TaskStatusResponse,
    summary="查询任务状态",
    description="查询指定策略记录的处理状态和历史",
)
async def get_task_status(record_id: str) -> TaskStatusResponse:
    record = db.get_record(record_id)
    if not record:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"记录 {record_id} 不存在")

    history = db.get_processing_history(record_id)

    current_stage = "处理完成"
    if record.task_status == TaskStatus.PENDING:
        current_stage = "等待人工复核"
    elif record.task_status == TaskStatus.PROCESSING:
        current_stage = "处理中"
    elif record.task_status == TaskStatus.REJECTED:
        current_stage = "已驳回"
    elif record.task_status == TaskStatus.ARCHIVED:
        current_stage = "已归档"

    estimated_completion = None
    if record.requires_manual_review and record.task_status == TaskStatus.PENDING:
        estimated_completion = record.created_at + timedelta(hours=24)

    return TaskStatusResponse(
        record_id=record.record_id,
        object_code=record.object_code,
        task_status=record.task_status,
        judgment_result=record.judgment_result,
        current_stage=current_stage,
        processing_history=history,
        estimated_completion=estimated_completion,
    )


@app.post(
    "/api/v1/strategy/playback",
    summary="数据回放",
    description="回放策略记录的完整计算过程和判断依据",
)
async def playback_strategy(request: DataPlaybackRequest) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    record = db.get_record(request.record_id)
    if not record:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"记录 {request.record_id} 不存在")

    if not record.data_playback_available:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="该记录不支持数据回放")

    playback_data = {
        "record_id": record.record_id,
        "basic_info": {
            "object_code": record.object_code,
            "occur_time": record.occur_time.isoformat(),
            "responsible_subject": record.responsible_subject,
            "evidence_summary": record.evidence_summary,
        },
        "input_config": record.config_rules,
        "judgment_result": {
            "result": record.judgment_result,
            "block_reason": record.block_reason,
            "reason": record.reason,
        },
        "validation_details": record.validation_errors,
        "rule_matching_details": record.matched_rules,
        "difference_hints": record.difference_hints,
    }

    if request.include_calculation_details:
        playback_data["calculation_details"] = {
            "calibration_note": record.calibration_note,
            "is_duplicate": record.is_duplicate,
            "duplicate_of": record.duplicate_of,
            "requires_manual_review": record.requires_manual_review,
        }

    if request.include_raw_evidence:
        playback_data["raw_evidence"] = {
            "evidence_summary": record.evidence_summary,
            "submitted_at": record.created_at.isoformat(),
        }

    return {
        "code": 0,
        "message": "数据回放成功",
        "data": playback_data,
    }


@app.get(
    "/api/v1/strategy/records",
    summary="查询历史记录",
    description="按条件查询策略记录列表",
)
async def query_records(
    object_code: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="对象编码"),
    start_time: Optional[datetime] = Query(None, description="开始时间"),
    end_time: Optional[datetime] = Query(None, description="结束时间"),
    task_status: Optional[TaskStatus] = Query(None, description="任务状态"),
    judgment_result: Optional[JudgmentResult] = Query(None, description="判断结果"),
    limit: int = Query(100, ge=1, le=1000, description="返回数量"),
    offset: int = Query(0, ge=0, description="偏移量"),
) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    records = db.query_records(
        object_code=object_code,
        start_time=start_time,
        end_time=end_time,
        task_status=task_status,
        judgment_result=judgment_result,
        limit=limit,
        offset=offset,
    )

    return {
        "code": 0,
        "message": "查询成功",
        "data": {
            "total": len(records),
            "limit": limit,
            "offset": offset,
            "records": [
                {
                    "record_id": r.record_id,
                    "object_code": r.object_code,
                    "occur_time": r.occur_time.isoformat(),
                    "responsible_subject": r.responsible_subject,
                    "judgment_result": r.judgment_result,
                    "block_reason": r.block_reason,
                    "task_status": r.task_status,
                    "requires_manual_review": r.requires_manual_review,
                    "created_at": r.created_at.isoformat(),
                }
                for r in records
            ],
        },
    }


@app.get(
    "/api/v1/strategy/statistics",
    summary="统计概览",
    description="获取策略处理统计数据",
)
async def get_statistics() -> Dict[str, Any]:
    stats = db.get_statistics()
    return {
        "code": 0,
        "message": "查询成功",
        "data": stats,
    }


@app.get(
    "/api/v1/strategy/{record_id}",
    summary="获取记录详情",
    description="获取单条策略记录的完整信息",
)
async def get_record_detail(record_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    record = db.get_record(record_id)
    if not record:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"记录 {record_id} 不存在")

    history = db.get_processing_history(record_id)

    return {
        "code": 0,
        "message": "查询成功",
        "data": {
            "record": record.model_dump(),
            "processing_history": history,
        },
    }


@app.get("/health", summary="健康检查")
async def health_check():
    return {"status": "ok", "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat()}
"}

                result = await response.json()
                if "record_id" in result:
                    self.created_records.append(result["record_id"])
                return result

    async def _get(self, endpoint: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:

        async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as session:

                return await response.json()

        print(f"失败: {total_count - passed_count}")
        print(f"通过率: {passed_count/total_count*100:.1f}%")
